function.name: get_class
function.description: Get detailed information about an ontology class, including its parent, children, attributes, and relations.

class_id.description: The class ID. Available: Asset, Capability, Control, DataObject, Document, Entity, Event, Goal, Governance, KPI, Measurement, Operational, OrgUnit, Organization, Party, Person, Policy, Process, ProductService, Resource, Risk, Role, Rule, SystemApplication

function.name: find_path
function.description: Find the shortest relationship path between two classes in the ontology.

function.name: list_instances
function.description: List all instances of a given class, including instances of its subclasses.

class_id.description: The class ID to query instances for

function.name: query_relations
function.description: Get all outgoing or incoming relations for a class.
